text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During a training session with Meisho Doto, three
students grab our attention.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, but would you let Meisho Doto go
partner running with us?
choice_data_list: I'm fine with it... but what do you think?
I'm fine with it... but what do you think?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eek?! Um, huh?! Well, th-the thing is...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
...I'm really happy you asked, but are you sure
you want someone like me?

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
We totally wanna run against you! I wanna learn
from that go-getter attitude of yours!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
B-but, I haven't done anything special to warrant
this praise...

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
That's not true! I've seen the way you always hold
on towards the end of the race. Just when you're
surrounded on all sides, you give it one final spurt
to break free... it's really something!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eep! Oh, th-thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Well, if you don't mind having me, then... I would
be happy to join you!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Yesss! I'll go get ready, okay?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
To be invited on a partner run is like a dream
come true... And it's all thanks to you, Trainer...
hehe.
